sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME, value FLOAT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (event_time, value, description) VALUES (time '14:35:45', -8.4, 'Negative Test'), (time '14:36:00', 0, 'Zero Test'), (time '14:36:15', 9.5, 'Positive Test');
SELECT id, sign(value) AS sign_value, event_time - time '01:00:00' AS adjusted_time FROM test_table WHERE sign(value) = -1;
SELECT id, value, event_time, sign((value + 10) * 2 - 18) AS complex_sign FROM test_table WHERE event_time > (SELECT event_time FROM test_table WHERE value = 0 LIMIT 1) ORDER BY complex_sign;

SELECT t.id, t.value, t.event_time - (SELECT time '01:00:00' WHERE t.id IS NOT NULL) AS due_time FROM test_table t WHERE sign(t.value) IN (SELECT sign(AVG(value * -1)) FROM test_table) GROUP BY t.id HAVING sign(value) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY due_time;

WITH temp AS (SELECT event_time - time '00:30:00' AS subtract_time, sign(value) AS sign_value FROM test_table) SELECT sign_value, COUNT(*) FROM temp WHERE sign_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sign_value HAVING sign_value <> 0;

SELECT id, value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE sign(value) = 1) AS positive_count, event_time - (value * time '00:10:00') AS time_adjusted FROM test_table WHERE value > 0 ORDER BY positive_count DESC;
